meaning: n.(中世纪)商业同业公会(会费)
examples: The first time I met Hanse I knew that he was an honest man.
Gil Hanse, 48, is the president of the company he founded in 1993 and has its headquarters in Malvern, Pennsylvania.
"Two hundred acres is the new standard for a golf course compared to 150 acres a few years ago, " Hanse said.
"We're at a point where something has to be done, " Hanse said.
